high_level_description: A dark surreal split-face portrait: the left half is a hyper-detailed eagle owl's face with a glowing amber eye, the right half is a pale young woman's face with one blue eye and red scratch marks on her cheek, the two halves merged seamlessly down the vertical center.

style_description.aesthetics: moody, hyperrealistic, dark surreal, cinematic, highly detailed
style_description.lighting: low-key dramatic side lighting, soft directional shadows, muted cool tones
style_description.art_style: hyperrealistic dark fantasy digital painting with photoreal skin and feather texture, fine micro-detail, shallow depth of field

compositional_deconstruction.background: A blurred, desaturated grey-brown backdrop, soft and out of focus with a dark vignette around the edges, keeping all attention on the central faces.

elements.desc: The left half of the frame is a hyper-detailed close-up of an eagle owl's face, with intricate brown, tan and grey feathers, a sharp hooked beak at center, and feather tufts. The owl gazes forward.
A large round glowing amber-orange owl eye with a deep black pupil and a fine ring of detailed feathers around it.

The right half of the frame is a pale fair-skinned young woman's face with long dark hair, a calm intense expression, full natural lips, and smooth subtly textured skin. Only one side of her face is shown, mirroring the owl.
A single striking pale blue-grey human eye, slightly glossy and catching soft light, looking directly forward.
Three diagonal dark-red cross-hatched scratch marks, like thin claw scratches, across the woman's cheekbone.
